title: Plesioneuron hopeanum
taxonomy: Plesioneuron hopeanum is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Plesioneuron, which is a group of ferns native to the Pacific Islands. Plesioneuron hopeanum is a specific species within this genus, known for its unique characteristics. The classification of Plesioneuron hopeanum includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Pteridophyta, and class as Polypodiopsida. This classification reflects its botanical identity and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
